creator: andrej@ebert.su
text:
Created attachment 258321
Update to 2.302 + pid fix

Update to the latest version.

The new hardcoded pid path from bug #273176 is not implemented, since just hardcoding the new path would break existing installs. Webmin has a single var_dir for everything, errorlogs, logs an pid file. This path ist written to /usr/local/etc/webmin/var-path  after setup.sh is completed.

So we just check for the existence of var-path (if it doesn't exist, setup.sh was not run) and then read the path path from /usr/local/etc/webmin/var-path in the rc.d script. This should work for new installs and upgrades, regardless of the actual path.

Like this:

required_files=%%PREFIX%%/etc/webmin/var-path
webmin_var_dir=`cat %%PREFIX%%/etc/webmin/var-path`

pidfile=${webmin_var_path}/miniserv.pid
